summary: Iteration 12 backend-only tests: projection & $size aggregation optimizations verified. All 6 tests passed in ~2.4s. /hr/stats/time-to-hire returns overall/by_source/by_role with correct structure and count sums match. /hr/question-bank returns 27 seeded + custom modules with count computed via Mongo $size. Created a TEST_ custom module with 3 questions, verified count=3 in list, full questions[] in detail, then deleted. Regressions on /hr/applications (trust desc) intact. Perf targets (<500ms) satisfied for both endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: hr_router.py time_to_hire: only reads projected fields (created_at, status, source, job_title on apps; created_at on invites; submitted_at on subs) — matches the applied projections; no KeyError risk.
list_modules pipeline correctly wraps with $ifNull to handle docs missing 'questions' array, avoiding $size errors.
get_module_detail still returns full questions[] for both seeded and custom modules — projection only applied on the list endpoint as intended.
test_credentials: HR hr@cohortdata.com / Cohort@2026; Master darshan@cohortdata.com / MasterCohort@2026 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
seed_data_creation: Custom module 'test_it12_<uuid>' created + deleted within test (idempotent cleanup in finally).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 optimizations (projections + $size) are safe and performant. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration12_projections.py is reusable as regression. No changes required.
